reviews.review_description:
We need to revive static, here’s why. Firstly, the game has so much potential, the game concept give this eerie feeling and storyline that no other VR game has. Secondly, the community was so wholesome and had so much livelihood to it, it’s like everyone was a close relative or good friend. Please if any devs are reading this, make this game turn back to how it was or even better.


From Noaidea
I had a lot of fun whith	my friend but this game is dead pretty good levels tho owner pls add more
bro the game is not fun anymore the games dead no players you cant load in and also it has no updates its still the Halloween update

This game is so fire I have nothing to say is wrong or how they can do better you can tell they put alot of effort in the game and the community its awesome you will definitely want to join their discord and the animations are so clean the story line is so smooth and the fits are so fire🔥 and this is just honestly a W game so if you think about getting it then I have one word YES
Download static,its fun horror fan game ,its in Halloween update for now,the staff are Active in game,love you❤️🫡

The support on the game is phenomenal, thank you to everyone who has downloaded the game already. 
I was in a few lobbies and everyone was so nice and we had a good time going through the levels and there was a few... screams coming from myself and others (level 3 scares me 😟) and it was just a good time.￼

reviews.review_title: I mean... what can I say
reviews.review_description: ABSOLUTELY LOVELY. JUST ABSOLUTELY LOVELY. Trust me this is one of the best gtag horror fan games out there (and it just doesnt get enough credit). The devs have done so much to keep it running. They were in 2k debt at one point but they are still working on updates. Truly spectacular. I'd just download and play, maybe buy a bundle or two to support the devs.

reviews.review_title: Probably one of the best horror game out
reviews.review_description: The game is amazing, first of all the cosmetics are very cool and funny, especially the gyat and the lil blue plushies, they are my favorite cosmetics. And for the levels, the levels are very fun because its always a different objective for each level, i find the game very fun and i also have a request. Could you make the monsters a bit harder to escape from, and also make them see you from a far. I dont want to ask for to much but could you add a 10-15 player lobby? A bunch of people i met on your awesome game said it would be even better with more friends to play with. Thanks for reading this 👍👍
Dude this game is so good don't listen to the people that hate hey at least you had the effort to make a gorilla tag vr game😊
This game is fun but needs more things added

reviews.review_title: Static is really fun but a bit buggy
reviews.review_description: Yes, I know this game just came out but there is a big issue. So when you join a private, one person in the lobby will have a monster that is frozen in one spot and it cannot be fixed unless you literally leave the game and join back. Other than that, this game is cool and I am hoping that the new levels are just as fun.

The monster is slow, and you’re slow too, but the monster is slower and is super easy to juke and sometimes will just run away from you. Also, I know it’s new but it’s still super boring. Idk why people are saying it’s super fun but it’s boring.

I bought this game today and finished it today. This game has amazing items you can style your character with. The only complaint might be that the jumpscare doesn’t have any sound. There is a few bugs with the elevator which i just want you guys to fix because I know this is a beta and I cant wait until more levels!
Stop with the gorilla tag spin offs the movement is only fun for children alot more adults play vr then these companies think and all this waddle movement is ridiculous

I love this game because there is so many things to do and buy I woke up 10 am for an update that doesn’t even come out till 1pm that’s how excited I was also make sure to subscribe to https://www.youtube.com/@TACOPLAYS_STATIC so I can get footpainter
I don't know any public codes

The game was done so well so high quality and its overall an amazing game.
